prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年物理类最低位次依次约16362→17372→16756→21511→20410名。2024年出现明显后移（较2023年下降约4755名），2025年略有回升（前移约1101名），整体呈波动后移趋势，2025年基准约20410名；该校在湖北省物理类招生计划：2021年81人、2022年82人、2023年80人、2024年84人、2025年85人，逐年小幅递增；2026年计划增至98人，较2025年扩招约15.3%，扩招幅度较大，对竞争格局有显著影响。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 华北电力大学（保定）为211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名2026年第84名（2025年第83名、2024年第75名），近年排名基本稳定在80名左右，属全国中上游水平；该校近年声誉平稳，未出现明显负面舆情或投档断档记录；抖音平台热度一般，短视频曝光量处于中等水平，未出现高热关注信号；电气工程为A级学科（全国顶尖），动力工程及工程热物理为A-级学科，两大学科均为电力行业核心支撑，与该校办学特色高度契合，对相关专业报考有较强吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 电气工程及其自动化专业社会热度持续升温，2024年被评为"高热推荐"；能源动力类专业亦获"推荐"评级。湖北省物理类考生数从2021年约14.7万持续增长至2025年约25.0万，2026年估算约25.6万，考生规模扩大加剧竞争；省控线（物理类本科批）近年波动在397–437分之间，2025年为426分，整体平稳。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次约20410名、2026年物理类大幅扩招约15.3%（位次后移压力）、湖北省物理类考生持续增长（竞争加剧）以及电气类专业社会热度持续升温（报考吸引力增强）等关键因素，预计2026年最低录取位次将较2025年明显后移。预测最低位次约22483名，区间21983–22983名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category were approximately 16362 → 17372 → 16756 → 21511 → 20410. In 2024, there was a significant drop (about 4755 places lower than 2023), and in 2025, a slight recovery (about 1101 places higher), showing an overall fluctuating downward trend, with a baseline of about 20410 in 2025. The university's enrollment plan for Physics Category in Hubei: 81 in 2021, 82 in 2022, 80 in 2023, 84 in 2024, 85 in 2025, increasing slightly year by year; in 2026, the plan increases to 98, an expansion of about 15.3% compared to 2025, which has a significant impact on the competitive landscape.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: North China Electric Power University (Baoding) is a 211 Project and Double First-Class university; its ranking in the Soft Science China University Rankings is 84th in 2026 (83rd in 2025, 75th in 2024), remaining stable around 80th in recent years, placing it at the upper-middle level nationally. The university's reputation has been stable recently, with no significant negative incidents or enrollment gaps. On Douyin, its popularity is moderate, with medium-level short video exposure and no signs of high attention. Electrical Engineering is an A-level discipline (top in the country), and Power Engineering and Engineering Thermophysics is an A- level discipline. Both disciplines are core supports for the power industry, closely aligned with the university's characteristics, and strongly attract applicants to related majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The social popularity of the Electrical Engineering and Automation major continues to rise, rated as 'highly recommended' in 2024; the Energy and Power major also received a 'recommended' rating. The number of Physics Category examinees in Hubei has grown from about 147,000 in 2021 to about 250,000 in 2025, with an estimated 256,000 in 2026, intensifying competition. The provincial control line (Physics Category undergraduate batch) has fluctuated between 397–437 points in recent years, with 426 points in 2025, remaining generally stable.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of about 20410, the significant expansion of Physics Category enrollment by about 15.3% in 2026 (pressure for ranking decline), the continuous growth of Physics Category examinees in Hubei (intensified competition), and the rising social popularity of electrical majors (increased attraction), it is expected that the minimum admission ranking in 2026 will drop significantly compared to 2025. The predicted minimum ranking is about 22483, with a range of 21983–22983.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Predicted ranking about 22483, range 21983–22983. Candidates within this range are advised to focus on Tier 2 majors (Energy and Power, Computer, Automation) as main choices, Tier 1 majors (Electrical Engineering and Automation and other flagship majors) as reach goals, and Tier 3 majors as safety options. Candidates with rankings significantly better than the upper limit (e.g., below 21983) can prioritize Tier 1 electrical majors; those near the lower limit should consider Tier 3 majors to ensure admission.

历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for History Category were approximately 4179 → 4258 → 4236 → 4652 → 4516, with overall small fluctuations. Over the past 5 years, rankings oscillated narrowly between 4179 and 4652, with a 2025 baseline of about 4516. The university's enrollment plan for History Category in Hubei Province: 7 students in 2021, 6 in 2022, 8 in 2023, 8 in 2024, and 7 in 2025. The 2026 plan remains at 7 students, unchanged from 2025, with no expansion or reduction.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: North China Electric Power University (Baoding) is a 211 Project and Double First-Class university. It ranks approximately 84th in the Soft Science ranking, placing it in the upper-middle tier nationally. The university excels in science and engineering, with a relatively small scale of liberal arts programs. Its reputation has been stable in recent years, with no significant negative public opinion or abnormal admission signals. Douyin platform popularity is moderate, with overall attention at a medium level. The university's advantageous disciplines are concentrated in Electrical Engineering (A) and Power Engineering and Engineering Thermophysics (A-), both in engineering fields. The History Category admission majors (Law, Foreign Languages and Literature, Social Work, and Public Administration) have low correlation with the advantageous disciplines.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The social popularity of Law is 'recommended' but shows a trend of divergence and wait-and-see. The popularity of Foreign Languages and Literature is 'general wait-and-see'. The number of History Category examinees in Hubei Province decreased from approximately 149,000 in 2021 to about 141,000 in 2025, with an estimated 138,000 in 2026, indicating a slight reduction in candidate scale and a slight easing of competition. The provincial control line (History Category undergraduate batch) fluctuated between 426 and 463 points in recent years, with 2025 at 442 points.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Based on the 2025 baseline ranking of approximately 4516, the unchanged 2026 enrollment plan, the slight reduction in History Category examinee scale (slightly eased competition), and the stable popularity of liberal arts majors, it is expected that the minimum admission ranking in 2026 will slightly improve compared to 2025. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 4486, with a range of 3986–4986.
